# DejaVu fonts

- **License:** Bitstream Vera + public domain
- **Upstream license:** [https://github.com/dejavu-fonts/dejavu-fonts/blob/master/LICENSE](https://github.com/dejavu-fonts/dejavu-fonts/blob/master/LICENSE)

NexUSB bundles **DejaVu fonts** unmodified from the Ubuntu/Debian archive.
The link above points to the authoritative upstream license; refer to
it for the full and current terms.
